mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, email, email_verified, phone, phone_verified, avatar, cover_image, signature, gender, birth_date, location, website, follow_count, follower_count, article_count, comment_count, like_count, last_login_time, last_login_ip, register_ip, register_time, privacy, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( username, password, nickname, email, email_verified, phone, phone_verified, avatar, cover_image, signature, gender, birth_date, location, website, follow_count, follower_count, article_count, comment_count, like_count, last_login_time, last_login_ip, register_ip, register_time, privacy, status, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{emailVerified}, #{phone}, #{phoneVerified}, #{avatar}, #{coverImage}, #{signature}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{location}, #{website}, #{followCount}, #{followerCount}, #{articleCount}, #{commentCount}, #{likeCount}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{registerIp}, #{registerTime}, #{privacy}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM user WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY follower_count DESC, article_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.article_status as articleStatus, a.review_status as reviewStatus, a.publish_time as publishTime, a.read_count as readCount, a.comment_count as commentCount, a.like_count as likeCount FROM article a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id, c.article_id as articleId, a.title as articleTitle, c.content, c.status, c.top, c.like_count as likeCount, c.reply_count as replyCount, c.create_time as createTime FROM comment c LEFT JOIN article a ON c.article_id = a.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
